fundamentals.name: ASML Holding N.V. - New York Re

judgment.summary: Dominant market player with strong growth, high margins, and robust cash flow, trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 8.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-15.
positives: Revenue growth 13.2% YoY and earnings growth 19.2% YoY indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin 36.0% and profit margin 29.7% demonstrate exceptional profitability.
Return on equity 52.2% and return on assets 15.7% show highly efficient capital utilization.
Free cash flow $8.24B TTM and $8.38B cash provide significant financial flexibility.
Consensus is strong buy with a mean target price suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E 51.57 and Forward P/E 32.50 indicate a high valuation.
PEG ratio 2.32 suggests growth may not fully justify the current P/E multiple.
Debt/Equity 12.99 is high, though offset by strong cash and FCF.
Beta 1.37 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: ASML's stock saw a rally following solid recent results, bolstered by CEO commentary highlighting tight supply in a booming chip market driven by soaring AI demand. The company's performance and outlook suggest strong underlying business momentum. Traders should consider the current valuation in light of continued AI-driven growth expectations and the upcoming earnings report.

headlines.title: ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) Rallied Following Solid Results
Exclusive-ASML CEO sees tight supply in booming chip market as AI demand soars
